aliases.description: Model aliases to expose in Pi model selection and rewrite before provider requests.

provider.description: Provider id for the model to alias.

model.description: Original provider model id sent to the API.

alias.description: Model id shown to Pi and accepted by model lookup.

name.description: Optional display name. Defaults to the alias id.

providerAliases.description: Provider display names to show in Pi UI while preserving the real provider id.

provider.description: Real Pi provider id to display under another name.

name.description: Display name shown for the provider in Pi UI.
